title: Create Refined Storage Recipes
description: Create: Refined Storage Recipes is Just A simple mod That Change the recipes of refined storage mod
body:
Create: Refined Storage Recipes is Just A simple mod That Change the recipes of refined storage mod

This mod is used in Create:letsCreate Modpack 

This mod change all Refined Storage recipes to create mod recipes by Using Create Mod Components 

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0e2597d43615b3dc1e8b202744a0a14804b32b.png)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3252cfa4e184a4f9b44d047443034d36ab19f42b.png)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1c69f6062b67db26053543abbcf228852bf094b.png)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4ec38cb0d772bd06e7baad8a7f9910038bab13f.png)![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72366117a19542e84bbcaa08530b9aba00358d19.png)![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cd69bc8b3514b609ff052b8a85027e1345bcc80.png)

some eg.

Also Available on [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-refined-storage-recipes)
